title: [Seq] LowerSeqToSV compilation error
body:
Using libstdc++ 12.2.0 (appears to be 12 onwards) from either GCC or clang fails to build:

```
[1/12] Building CXX object lib/Dialect/Seq/Transforms/CMakeFiles/obj.CIRCTSeqTransforms.dir/LowerSeqToSV.cpp.o
FAILED: lib/Dialect/Seq/Transforms/CMakeFiles/obj.CIRCTSeqTransforms.dir/LowerSeqToSV.cpp.o 
/nix/store/bfbp3ypd9nm3fapz634gvvs738blrl0y-gcc-wrapper-12.2.0/bin/g++ -D_DEBUG -D_GLIBCXX_ASSERTIONS -D_LIBCPP_ENABLE_ASSERTIONS -D__STDC_CONSTANT_MACROS -D__STDC_FORMAT_MACROS -D__STDC_LIMIT_MACROS -I/home/will/cur/circt/tmp/source/include -I/home/will/cur/circt/tmp/source/build/include -fno-exceptions -fno-rtti -fPIC -fno-semantic-interposition -fvisibility-inlines-hidden -Werror=date-time -Wall -Wextra -Wno-unused-parameter -Wwrite-strings -Wcast-qual -Wno-missing-field-initializers -Wimplicit-fallthrough -Wno-class-memaccess -Wno-redundant-move -Wno-pessimizing-move -Wno-noexcept-type -Wdelete-non-virtual-dtor -Wsuggest-override -Wno-comment -Wno-misleading-indentation -Wctad-maybe-unsupported -fdiagnostics-color -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections -O3 -DNDEBUG  -fno-exceptions -funwind-tables -UNDEBUG -std=gnu++17 -MD -MT lib/Dialect/Seq/Transforms/CMakeFiles/obj.CIRCTSeqTransforms.dir/LowerSeqToSV.cpp.o -MF lib/Dialect/Seq/Transforms/CMakeFiles/obj.CIRCTSeqTransforms.dir/LowerSeqToSV.cpp.o.d -o lib/Dialect/Seq/Transforms/CMakeFiles/obj.CIRCTSeqTransforms.dir/LowerSeqToSV.cpp.o -c /home/will/cur/circt/tmp/source/lib/Dialect/Seq/Transforms/LowerSeqToSV.cpp
In file included from /nix/store/wx4nsqbssywgx9zkabwgl9sxm5l61ni3-gcc-12.2.0/include/c++/12.2.0/type_traits:38,
                 from /nix/store/wx4nsqbssywgx9zkabwgl9sxm5l61ni3-gcc-12.2.0/include/c++/12.2.0/optional:37,
                 from /nix/store/vrlq55v6lsnrnbjng3nd8p9iy6ih1cf9-llvm-20230322_c81f14e-dev/include/llvm/ADT/None.h:20,
                 from /nix/store/3qm8qsigl4v9gb3b61j7lzinddgbyqxj-mlir-20230322_c81f14e-dev/include/mlir/Support/LLVM.h:23,
                 from /home/will/cur/circt/tmp/source/include/circt/Support/LLVM.h:22,
                 from /home/will/cur/circt/tmp/source/include/circt/Dialect/HW/HWDialect.h:16,
                 from /home/will/cur/circt/tmp/source/include/circt/Dialect/HW/HWOps.h:16,
                 from /home/will/cur/circt/tmp/source/lib/Dialect/Seq/Transforms/PassDetails.h:17,
                 from /home/will/cur/circt/tmp/source/lib/Dialect/Seq/Transforms/LowerSeqToSV.cpp:13:
/nix/store/wx4nsqbssywgx9zkabwgl9sxm5l61ni3-gcc-12.2.0/include/c++/12.2.0/bits/stl_iterator.h: In instantiation of ‘constexpr std::reverse_iterator<_Iterator>::reverse_iterator() [with _Iterator = llvm::detail::indexed_accessor_range_base<mlir::OperandRange, mlir::OpOperand*, mlir::Value, mlir::Value, mlir::Value>::iterator]’:
/nix/store/wx4nsqbssywgx9zkabwgl9sxm5l61ni3-gcc-12.2.0/include/c++/12.2.0/type_traits:971:30:   required from ‘struct std::__is_constructible_impl<std::reverse_iterator<llvm::detail::indexed_accessor_range_base<mlir::OperandRange, mlir::OpOperand*, mlir::Value, mlir::Value, mlir::Value>::iterator> >’
/nix/store/wx4nsqbssywgx9zkabwgl9sxm5l61ni3-gcc-12.2.0/include/c++/12.2.0/type_traits:167:12:   required from ‘struct std::__and_<std::__is_constructible_impl<std::reverse_iterator<llvm::detail::indexed_accessor_range_base<mlir::OperandRange, mlir::OpOperand*, mlir::Value, mlir::Value, mlir::Value>::iterator> >, std::__is_implicitly_default_constructible_safe<std::reverse_iterator<llvm::detail::indexed_accessor_range_base<mlir::OperandRange, mlir::OpOperand*, mlir::Value, mlir::Value, mlir::Value>::iterator> > >’
/nix/store/wx4nsqbssywgx9zkabwgl9sxm5l61ni3-gcc-12.2.0/include/c++/12.2.0/type_traits:1258:12:   required from ‘struct std::__is_implicitly_default_constructible<std::reverse_iterator<llvm::detail::indexed_accessor_range_base<mlir::OperandRange, mlir::OpOperand*, mlir::Value, mlir::Value, mlir::Value>::iterator> >’
/nix/store/wx4nsqbssywgx9zkabwgl9sxm5l61ni3-gcc-12.2.0/include/c++/12.2.0/type_traits:167:12:   required from ‘struct std::__and_<std::__is_implicitly_default_constructible<llvm::detail::index_stream::iterator>, std::__is_implicitly_default_constructible<std::reverse_iterator<llvm::detail::indexed_accessor_range_base<mlir::OperandRange, mlir::OpOperand*, mlir::Value, mlir::Value, mlir::Value>::iterator> > >’
/nix/store/wx4nsqbssywgx9zkabwgl9sxm5l61ni3-gcc-12.2.0/include/c++/12.2.0/tuple:581:12:   required from ‘static constexpr bool std::_TupleConstraints<<anonymous>, _Types>::__is_implicitly_default_constructible() [with bool <anonymous> = true; _Types = {llvm::detail::index_stream::iterator, std::reverse_iterator<llvm::detail::indexed_accessor_range_base<mlir::OperandRange, mlir::OpOperand*, mlir::Value, mlir::Value, mlir::Value>::iterator>}]’
/nix/store/wx4nsqbssywgx9zkabwgl9sxm5l61ni3-gcc-12.2.0/include/c++/12.2.0/tuple:989:43:   required by substitution of ‘template<class _Alloc, typename std::enable_if<std::_TupleConstraints<std::is_object<_Alloc>::value, llvm::detail::index_stream::iterator, std::reverse_iterator<llvm::detail::indexed_accessor_range_base<mlir::OperandRange, mlir::OpOperand*, mlir::Value, mlir::Value, mlir::Value>::iterator> >::__is_implicitly_default_constructible(), bool>::type <anonymous> > std::tuple<llvm::detail::index_stream::iterator, std::reverse_iterator<llvm::detail::indexed_accessor_range_base<mlir::OperandRange, mlir::OpOperand*, mlir::Value, mlir::Value, mlir::Value>::iterator> >::tuple(std::allocator_arg_t, const _Alloc&) [with _Alloc = std::reverse_iterator<llvm::detail::indexed_accessor_range_base<mlir::OperandRange, mlir::OpOperand*, mlir::Value, mlir::Value, mlir::Value>::iterator>; typename std::enable_if<std::_TupleConstraints<std::is_object<_Alloc>::value, llvm::detail::index_stream::iterator, std::reverse_iterator<llvm::detail::indexed_accessor_range_base<mlir::OperandRange, mlir::OpOperand*, mlir::Value, mlir::Value, mlir::Value>::iterator> >::__is_implicitly_default_constructible(), bool>::type <anonymous> = <missing>]’
/nix/store/vrlq55v6lsnrnbjng3nd8p9iy6ih1cf9-llvm-20230322_c81f14e-dev/include/llvm/ADT/STLExtras.h:821:32:   required from ‘llvm::detail::zip_common<ZipType, ReferenceTupleType, Iters>::zip_common(Iters&& ...) [with ZipType = llvm::detail::zip_enumerator<llvm::detail::index_stream::iterator, std::reverse_iterator<llvm::detail::indexed_accessor_range_base<mlir::OperandRange, mlir::OpOperand*, mlir::Value, mlir::Value, mlir::Value>::iterator> >; ReferenceTupleType = llvm::detail::enumerator_result<long unsigned int, mlir::Value>; Iters = {llvm::detail::index_stream::iterator, std::reverse_iterator<llvm::detail::indexed_accessor_range_base<mlir::OperandRange, mlir::OpOperand*, mlir::Value, mlir::Value, mlir::Value>::iterator>}]’
/nix/store/vrlq55v6lsnrnbjng3nd8p9iy6ih1cf9-llvm-20230322_c81f14e-dev/include/llvm/ADT/STLExtras.h:2279:31:   required from ‘llvm::detail::zippy<ItType, Args>::iterator llvm::detail::zippy<ItType, Args>::begin_impl(std::index_sequence<__var_indices ...>) [with long unsigned int ...Ns = {0, 1}; ItType = llvm::detail::zip_enumerator; Args = {llvm::detail::index_stream, llvm::iterator_range<std::reverse_iterator<llvm::detail::indexed_accessor_range_base<mlir::OperandRange, mlir::OpOperand*, mlir::Value, mlir::Value, mlir::Value>::iterator> >}; iterator = llvm::detail::zip_enumerator<llvm::detail::index_stream::iterator, std::reverse_iterator<llvm::detail::indexed_accessor_range_base<mlir::OperandRange, mlir::OpOperand*, mlir::Value, mlir::Value, mlir::Value>::iterator> >; std::index_sequence<__var_indices ...> = std::integer_sequence<long unsigned int, 0, 1>]’
/nix/store/vrlq55v6lsnrnbjng3nd8p9iy6ih1cf9-llvm-20230322_c81f14e-dev/include/llvm/ADT/STLExtras.h:918:39:   required from ‘llvm::detail::zippy<ItType, Args>::iterator llvm::detail::zippy<ItType, Args>::begin() [with ItType = llvm::detail::zip_enumerator; Args = {llvm::detail::index_stream, llvm::iterator_range<std::reverse_iterator<llvm::detail::indexed_accessor_range_base<mlir::OperandRange, mlir::OpOperand*, mlir::Value, mlir::Value, mlir::Value>::iterator> >}; iterator = llvm::detail::zip_enumerator<llvm::detail::index_stream::iterator, std::reverse_iterator<llvm::detail::indexed_accessor_range_base<mlir::OperandRange, mlir::OpOperand*, mlir::Value, mlir::Value, mlir::Value>::iterator> >]’
/home/will/cur/circt/tmp/source/lib/Dialect/Seq/Transforms/LowerSeqToSV.cpp:468:62:   required from here
/nix/store/wx4nsqbssywgx9zkabwgl9sxm5l61ni3-gcc-12.2.0/include/c++/12.2.0/bits/stl_iterator.h:183:7: error: no matching function for call to ‘llvm::detail::indexed_accessor_range_base<mlir::OperandRange, mlir::OpOperand*, mlir::Value, mlir::Value, mlir::Value>::iterator::iterator()’
  183 |       _GLIBCXX_NOEXCEPT_IF(noexcept(_Iterator()))
      |       ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
In file included from /nix/store/vrlq55v6lsnrnbjng3nd8p9iy6ih1cf9-llvm-20230322_c81f14e-dev/include/llvm/ADT/ArrayRef.h:14,
                 from /nix/store/3qm8qsigl4v9gb3b61j7lzinddgbyqxj-mlir-20230322_c81f14e-dev/include/mlir/IR/AffineMap.h:19,
                 from /nix/store/3qm8qsigl4v9gb3b61j7lzinddgbyqxj-mlir-20230322_c81f14e-dev/include/mlir/IR/BuiltinAttributeInterfaces.h:12,
                 from /nix/store/3qm8qsigl4v9gb3b61j7lzinddgbyqxj-mlir-20230322_c81f14e-dev/include/mlir/IR/BuiltinAttributes.h:12,
                 from /home/will/cur/circt/tmp/source/include/circt/Dialect/HW/HWDialect.h:17:
/nix/store/vrlq55v6lsnrnbjng3nd8p9iy6ih1cf9-llvm-20230322_c81f14e-dev/include/llvm/ADT/STLExtras.h:1345:5: note: candidate: ‘llvm::detail::indexed_accessor_range_base<DerivedT, BaseT, T, PointerT, ReferenceT>::iterator::iterator(BaseT, ptrdiff_t) [with DerivedT = mlir::OperandRange; BaseT = mlir::OpOperand*; T = mlir::Value; PointerT = mlir::Value; ReferenceT = mlir::Value; ptrdiff_t = long int]’
 1345 |     iterator(BaseT owner, ptrdiff_t curIndex)
      |     ^~~~~~~~
/nix/store/vrlq55v6lsnrnbjng3nd8p9iy6ih1cf9-llvm-20230322_c81f14e-dev/include/llvm/ADT/STLExtras.h:1345:5: note:   candidate expects 2 arguments, 0 provided
/nix/store/vrlq55v6lsnrnbjng3nd8p9iy6ih1cf9-llvm-20230322_c81f14e-dev/include/llvm/ADT/STLExtras.h:1336:9: note: candidate: ‘constexpr llvm::detail::indexed_accessor_range_base<mlir::OperandRange, mlir::OpOperand*, mlir::Value, mlir::Value, mlir::Value>::iterator::iterator(const llvm::detail::indexed_accessor_range_base<mlir::OperandRange, mlir::OpOperand*, mlir::Value, mlir::Value, mlir::Value>::iterator&)’
 1336 |   class iterator : public indexed_accessor_iterator<iterator, BaseT, T,
      |         ^~~~~~~~
/nix/store/vrlq55v6lsnrnbjng3nd8p9iy6ih1cf9-llvm-20230322_c81f14e-dev/include/llvm/ADT/STLExtras.h:1336:9: note:   candidate expects 1 argument, 0 provided
/nix/store/vrlq55v6lsnrnbjng3nd8p9iy6ih1cf9-llvm-20230322_c81f14e-dev/include/llvm/ADT/STLExtras.h:1336:9: note: candidate: ‘constexpr llvm::detail::indexed_accessor_range_base<mlir::OperandRange, mlir::OpOperand*, mlir::Value, mlir::Value, mlir::Value>::iterator::iterator(llvm::detail::indexed_accessor_range_base<mlir::OperandRange, mlir::OpOperand*, mlir::Value, mlir::Value, mlir::Value>::iterator&&)’
/nix/store/vrlq55v6lsnrnbjng3nd8p9iy6ih1cf9-llvm-20230322_c81f14e-dev/include/llvm/ADT/STLExtras.h:1336:9: note:   candidate expects 1 argument, 0 provided
```

The problem originates here:
https://github.com/llvm/circt/blob/eb4f27031746c3b13e47a485bd4d87713f4e1902/lib/Dialect/Seq/Transforms/LowerSeqToSV.cpp#L468 .

If this is worked around, a similar construct also fails: https://github.com/llvm/circt/blob/eb4f27031746c3b13e47a485bd4d87713f4e1902/lib/Dialect/Seq/Transforms/LowerSeqToSV.cpp#L364 .

This may be an upstream issue (MLIR, LLVM, or even toolchain?).
